commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add expense/receipt tracker with photo storage + auto-tagging

- Photos saved to persistent volume (data/uploads/)
- Auction invoice photos saved and linked to auctions
- New expenses table with category, vendor, amount, date, photo
- Auto-tag receipts via Claude (extracts amount, vendor, category, date)
- Expenses tab replaces Summary tab in bottom nav
- CRUD endpoints: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/expenses
- File upload endpoint: POST /api/upload
- Static file serving: /api/files/
- DB migration for invoice_file column on existing auctions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Major data integrity fixes + invoice generation

Fixes:
- SQL injection: whitelist allowed field names in bulk update
- Service worker: never cache /api/ responses (was serving stale data)
- Sale creation: wrapped in single transaction (atomic)
- Undo sale: properly deletes sale record + resets items (was orphaning)
- Stale data: all tabs refresh via refreshKey when navigated to
- Delete auction: requires confirmation dialog
- Safe area: StorageView floating bar + HomeFeed FAB respect iOS safe area
- Loading state: AuctionDetail shows spinner while loading

New features:
- Invoice generation: tap file icon on any sale to generate printable invoice
- DELETE /api/sales/:id endpoint for proper sale reversal
- GET /api/invoices/:saleId endpoint for invoice data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Zig protobuf generation support

Add Zig as the 11th output language using Arwalk/zig-protobuf (v3.0.1).
Installs Zig 0.15.1 and builds protoc-gen-zig in the Docker base image.
Uses AWK annotation stripping (same as C/nanopb) since Zig doesn't
support buf.validate extensions.

Full-stack app with React + Express + SQLite for tracking auction buys,
metal sorting, sales (marketplace & scrap yard), and profit/loss per deal.
Includes password auth, Claude API integration, Docker deployment support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix orphan registry seeds causing KERI Agent readiness failure

Identity cleanup (delete_identity_seed, bulk cleanup) was not cascading
to registry seeds, leaving orphans in PostgreSQL. On restart, state
verification expected 56 registries but only 14 could be rebuilt (the
other 42 had no matching identity seed), causing readiness -> failed.

- Cascade registry seed deletion in delete_identity_seed(),
  delete_identity_seed_by_aid(), and delete_identity_seeds_bulk()
- Add delete_orphan_registry_seeds() to SeedStore for cleanup
- Auto-clean orphan registry seeds at start of _rebuild_registries()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Quill editor, neobrutalist redesign, and core improvements (#5)

* feat(web): redesign with Tailwind v4 and simplified UI

Replace the Slack-mimicking chat interface with a clean,
dark-themed single-textarea formatter using Tailwind CSS v4.
Drop message preview, keep paste detection and copy-to-clipboard.

* fix(core): improve nested list indentation and ordered list numbering

Use per-indent-level counters for ordered lists instead of a single
global counter, and switch to 4-space indentation for nested lists.
This fixes numbering resets when mixing bullet/ordered lists at
different nesting levels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(web): replace textarea with Quill-based dual-pane editor

Replace the plain textarea with a dual-pane layout: markdown input on
the left and a read-only Quill preview on the right showing Slack-like
rendering. Adds bidirectional scroll sync, copy-flash animation, and
a standalone Quill editor component.

- Swap quill-delta-to-html dep for quill
- Add DualPaneEditor, MarkdownPane, QuillPane, Editor components
- Add Slack-like dark theme CSS for Quill
- Refactor clipboard utils for delta-based copy
- Remove old TextArea component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add changesets for nested list fix and quill editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(core): detect syntax-highlighted markdown in HTML input

When HTML contains syntax-highlighted markdown (e.g. copied from code
editors), extract the plain text as markdown instead of letting Turndown
escape all markdown characters.

* chore: add changeset for syntax-highlighted markdown detection

* feat(web): redesign with Tailwind v4 and simplified UI

Dark neobrutalist UI with light/dark theming via CSS variables,
responsive mobile layout, and bidirectional scroll sync.

Extracts NeoButton, PaneHeader, CopyFlash, NavButtons, LayoutIcons
components and useScrollSync, useMarkdownConverter, useTheme hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ref(web): extract useLayout and useClipboard hooks

Moves layout cycling and clipboard/flash logic out of
DualPaneEditor into dedicated hooks for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(core): preserve original spacing before lists

remark-stringify always inserts a blank line between a paragraph and a
list. Use position info from the AST to respect the original spacing.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix critical connection bugs - video disappearing and share link

Bug 1: Stream killed on lobby unmount (CRITICAL)
- Added streamHandedOffRef to track if stream passed to parent
- Cleanup now skips stopCamera when joining call
- Video no longer disappears after joining

Bug 2: Asymmetric video initiation (HIGH)
- Both host AND guest now initiate video call
- Removed !isHost condition that blocked host
- Makes connection symmetric and reliable

Bug 3: Premature "connected" status (HIGH)
- Changed data channel open to set "connecting" status
- Only set "connected" when video stream actually received
- UI now accurately reflects connection state

Bug 4: Dead stream fallback (SAFETY)
- Added isStreamActive() validation
- If lobby stream has stopped tracks, get new stream
- Prevents black video on edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

opus-2026-03-06-S11b: algebraic proof of singleton cancellation lemma

Theorem: If position subset has an isolated position (not adjacent to any
selected position), the centered product sum vanishes.

Proof: The isolated edge factors from the product. Swapping the two
vertices at the isolated position negates the edge factor while leaving
all other edges unchanged. Pairing permutations this way gives exact
cancellation since A[a,b]+A[b,a]=1 implies (A[a,b]-1/2)+(A[b,a]-1/2)=0.

Also verified: H(T) = H(T^op) always (complement invariance).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign property details page with Supabase-inspired AI-world UI

- Complete layout overhaul: gallery → sticky PropertySectionNav → 2-col grid (content + sticky sidebar)
- 5 anchor-based sections: Details | AI Intelligence | Finance | Location | Builder & Reviews
- PropertySectionNav: IntersectionObserver active tracking, amber indicator pill

- SimilarProperties: cards now link to /properties/[id] (were missing navigation)

commit.message:
Major training platform upgrade: animated courses, inbox simulator, attack lab

- Animated course viewer: auto-play mode with typewriter titles, staggered
  content fade-ins, counting stat numbers, 8s auto-advance with progress bar
- Phishing Inbox Simulator: gamified exercise with 34 emails (legit + phishing),
  3 difficulty levels, countdown timer, scoring, grades, high score tracking
- Attack Lab: 5-stage interactive "think like a hacker" exercise where users
  build a phishing attack against 3 fictional companies, then see which
  security defenses would catch it. No competitor has this.
- 40 branded phishing templates with realistic email client previews
- 15 courses with 151 slides and 80 quiz questions
- Zero PalisadeOne branding on phishing email previews

fix: admin Sign Out button sending empty JSON body

The admin apiFetch client always sets Content-Type: application/json,
but the logout call had no body. Fastify rejected it with
FST_ERR_CTP_EMPTY_JSON_BODY (400). Send '{}' to fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(client): preload card images to prevent white flash (#113) * fix(client): preload card images to prevent white flash on first render Cards loaded SVGs on-demand via tags, causing a brief white rectangle flash before the image loaded. Preload all 52 card SVGs at app startup and hide the until its onLoad fires as a fallback. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 * refactor(client): move preload logic to separate file to fix lint warning The react-refresh/only-export-components rule warns when a file exports both components and non-component functions. Moved preloadCardImages() and preloadedCardUrls to a dedicated preload-cards.ts module. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 * refactor(client): deduplicate SUITS, RANKS, and RANK_NAMES constants Import SUITS and RANKS from @spades/shared instead of redeclaring them. Consolidate RANK_NAMES and getCardImageUrl into preload-cards.ts so Card.tsx imports them from a single source. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 --------- Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6
